name: Indian Mutton Curry (or Beef)
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon curry powder, or to taste
3/4 cup coconut cream, diluted to 1 and a half cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a moderately hot skillet or wok, add butter. Add onions, garlic, chilies, mustard seeds, curry powder, coriander powder, chili powder, cumin powder, turmeric powder, and ginger. Stir constantly until the onions are translucent.
2. Lower the heat and add beef and vegetables. Sauté until the beef is browned.
3. Add diluted coconut cream and vinegar.
4. Simmer on very low heat until the meat is nearly tender.
5. When the vegetables and meat are tender, stir in rice flour mixed with a little water and salt. Add more water if necessary.
